n: The Drumming of the Grey Wood

steps.t: The Grey Wood is west of Crithost. You should scout the edge of the Grey Wood for evidence of Orcs.
The Grey Wood is west of Crithost. You should scout the edge of the Grey Wood for evidence of Orcs.
The strange staff can be found in the woods outside Crithost next to the Grey Wood. You should pick up the staff and bring it to Ceveneth.
Ceveneth can be found in the hall of Crithost. You should speak with Ceveneth.
